name: Colombo
description: The bustling commercial capital of Sri Lanka.

name: Kandy
description: Home to the Temple of the Tooth Relic, a sacred Buddhist site.

name: Ella
description: Famous for its stunning views, tea plantations, and hiking trails like Little Adam's Peak.

name: Yala National Park
description: One of the world's best places to see leopards, elephants, and a huge variety of birds.

name: Mirissa
description: A popular spot for whale watching, surfing, and relaxing on sandy beaches.

name: Sigiriya
description: An ancient rock fortress with dramatic views and historic frescoes.

name: Galle Fort
description: A beautiful Dutch colonial fort with cobblestone streets, boutiques, and cafes.

name: Nuwara Eliya
description: Known as 'Little England' for its cool climate and colonial-era architecture, surrounded by tea plantations.
